'''âd-h-p''' ('''kadahap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ecycle|ecycle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ecycle|ecycle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-h-p
|-
! Lemma
| kadahap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidahap|thidahap]] || [[word:jidahap|jidahap]] || [[word:shidahap|shidahap]] || [[word:kidahap|kidahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudahap|thuthudahap]] || [[word:jujudahap|jujudahap]] || [[word:shushudahap|shushudahap]] || [[word:kukudahap|kukudahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudahap|thudahap]] || [[word:judahap|judahap]] || [[word:shudahap|shudahap]] || [[word:kudahap|kudahap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudahap|thudahap]] || [[word:judahap|judahap]] || [[word:shudahap|shudahap]] || [[word:kudahap|kudahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedahap|thedahap]] || [[word:jedahap|jedahap]] || [[word:shedahap|shedahap]] || [[word:kedahap|kedahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodahap|thothodahap]] || [[word:jojodahap|jojodahap]] || [[word:shoshodahap|shoshodahap]] || [[word:kokodahap|kokodahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodahap|thodahap]] || [[word:jodahap|jodahap]] || [[word:shodahap|shodahap]] || [[word:kodahap|kodahap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodahap|thodahap]] || [[word:jodahap|jodahap]] || [[word:shodahap|shodahap]] || [[word:kodahap|kodahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdahap|thĂŠdahap]] || [[word:jĂŠdahap|jĂŠdahap]] || [[word:shĂŠdahap|shĂŠdahap]] || [[word:kĂŠdahap|kĂŠdahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadahap|thathadahap]] || [[word:jajadahap|jajadahap]] || [[word:shashadahap|shashadahap]] || [[word:kakadahap|kakadahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadahap|thadahap]] || [[word:jadahap|jadahap]] || [[word:shadahap|shadahap]] || [[word:kadahap|kadahap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadahap|thadahap]] || [[word:jadahap|jadahap]] || [[word:shadahap|shadahap]] || [[word:kadahap|kadahap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadahap|shadahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadahap|goshadahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadahap|gokishadahap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadahapnĂŒ|shadahapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadahapnknĂŒ|goshadahapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahapnĂŒ|gokishadahapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadahapshĂ«|shadahapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadahapnkshĂ«|goshadahapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadahapshĂ«|gokishadahapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahapro|shadahapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahapnkro|goshadahapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahapro|gokishadahapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahapmu|shadahapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahapnkmu|goshadahapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahapmu|gokishadahapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadahapsher|shadahapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadahapnksher|goshadahapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadahapsher|gokishadahapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadahapng|shadahapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadahapnkng|goshadahapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadahapng|gokishadahapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadahapya|shadahapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadahapnkya|goshadahapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadahapya|gokishadahapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadahapyam|shadahapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadahapnkyam|goshadahapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadahapyam|gokishadahapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahapnĂŒshĂ«|shadahapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadahapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadahapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahapnĂŒro|shadahapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahapnknĂŒro|goshadahapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahapnĂŒro|gokishadahapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahapnĂŒmu|shadahapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahapnknĂŒmu|goshadahapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahapnĂŒmu|gokishadahapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahapshĂ«nĂŒ|shadahapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadahapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadahapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahapshĂ«ro|shadahapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahapnkshĂ«ro|goshadahapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahapshĂ«ro|gokishadahapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahapshĂ«mu|shadahapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahapnkshĂ«mu|goshadahapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahapshĂ«mu|gokishadahapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahapronĂŒ|shadahapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahapnkronĂŒ|goshadahapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahapronĂŒ|gokishadahapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahaproshĂ«|shadahaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahapnkroshĂ«|goshadahapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahaproshĂ«|gokishadahaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadahapromu|shadahapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadahapnkromu|goshadahapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadahapromu|gokishadahapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadahapmunĂŒ|shadahapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadahapnkmunĂŒ|goshadahapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadahapmunĂŒ|gokishadahapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadahapmushĂ«|shadahapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadahapnkmushĂ«|goshadahapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadahapmushĂ«|gokishadahapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadahapmuro|shadahapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadahapnkmuro|goshadahapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadahapmuro|gokishadahapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
